assessment.note: He confirms reduced participation in team rituals, which is a strong engagement dip with a mild wellbeing signal.

new_queue.label: Less present in rituals
new_queue.name: You said 'less present in rituals' — what feels different there lately?
new_queue.description: Drills into his own phrasing to surface what changed in his participation without leading him.

new_queue.label: Set the frame
new_queue.name: Before we get into specifics, what would be most useful to talk through today?
new_queue.description: Gives James control over the agenda and establishes a low-pressure starting point.

new_queue.label: Since the decision
new_queue.name: What has changed for you since the promotion decision?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the most salient shift in his day-to-day without forcing him to name the cause.

new_queue.label: Open invitation
new_queue.name: Is there anything on your mind that we haven't made space to talk about?
new_queue.description: Intentionally open; lets them name the thing before the manager assumes.

new_queue.label: What landed
new_queue.name: What feedback do you think landed most clearly for you?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the specific message he heard rather than his general reaction to it.

new_queue.label: Feedback gap
new_queue.name: What part of the feedback still feels unresolved to you?
new_queue.description: Finds the missing piece or ambiguity that may be shaping his next steps.

new_queue.label: Next path
new_queue.name: What concrete path forward do you see for yourself from here?
new_queue.description: Gets James to name the direction he believes is real rather than waiting for the manager to define it.

new_queue.label: First move
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to shift before we next meet?
new_queue.description: Ends the conversation on a specific commitment that can be followed up.
